text: Program evaluation is a process for gathering information about the implementation of programs and the process by which decisions are made. As a tool for the educator involved in the assessment of programs implemented in the schools, this study utilized a literature review of current journal and e-book literature to identify major dimensions that should be considered. Major findings include the importance of thorough examination of the impact of the evaluations that have been conducted of the programs of previous years, and that the evaluations should be carried out within the framework of current educational policy so that a standard of quality may be established. This study provides a base from which school administrators, and those in a supervisory capacity, may have a basis for assessing school activities and for planning improvements in the schools for years to come.
headline: Fully Human Written
